title: Jastreboff et al. Triple-Hormone-Receptor Agonist Retatrutide for Obesity. NEJM 2023.
supports_claim: Retatrutide is a triple GIP/GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist in phase 2 obesity trial; most common adverse events were gastrointestinal and dose-related; heart-rate increases were observed.
does_not_support: Does not prove IV therapy improves retatrutide efficacy or tolerability.
evidence_directness: direct for retatrutide axis and adverse-signal context; indirect for IV support logic

title: DailyMed Mounjaro / tirzepatide label
supports_claim: Tirzepatide delays gastric emptying and may affect oral medication absorption; GI effects and hypoglycemia-risk context with insulin/secretagogues are clinically relevant.
does_not_support: Does not prove IV infusion supports GLP-1/GIP therapy.
evidence_directness: direct for GLP/GIP class pharmacology; indirect for retatrutide support logic

title: DailyMed Ozempic / semaglutide label
supports_claim: Semaglutide label warns about dehydration associated with GI adverse reactions and acute kidney injury risk; patients should avoid fluid depletion and report persistent nausea/vomiting/diarrhea.
does_not_support: Does not prove routine IV hydration is required for all incretin patients.
evidence_directness: direct for GI/dehydration/renal-risk logic; indirect for IV support trigger

title: DailyMed Egrifta SV / tesamorelin label
supports_claim: Tesamorelin increases IGF-1 and can result in glucose intolerance/diabetes; IGF-1 and glycemic monitoring are clinically relevant.
does_not_support: Does not prove amino-acid, NAD, or hydration IV improves tesamorelin or ipamorelin outcomes.
evidence_directness: direct for GH/IGF-1 axis safety/lab context; indirect for IV support

title: MOTS-c: A promising mitochondrial-derived peptide for therapeutic exploitation. 2023 review.
supports_claim: MOTS-c is a mitochondrial-derived peptide with preclinical/metabolic/AMPK-related mechanistic literature and possible metabolic relevance.
does_not_support: Does not prove IV NAD/NR or glutathione improves MOTS-c efficacy or clinical outcomes.

title: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT07505745: MOTS-c for improving insulin sensitivity in adults with prediabetes
supports_claim: Human clinical trial activity exists for MOTS-c and insulin-sensitivity endpoints.
does_not_support: Trial registration is not proof of efficacy, safety, dosing superiority, or IV support synergy.
evidence_directness: human research signal only, not outcome evidence

title: Reyna et al. 2026: Intravenous infusion of NAD+ versus NR tolerability pilot
supports_claim: NR IV and NAD+ IV have preliminary real-world human tolerability data; NR IV had shorter infusion times and milder transient symptoms than NAD+ IV in this retrospective pilot.
does_not_support: Does not prove anti-aging, disease treatment, durable outcomes, or peptide-combination benefit.
evidence_directness: direct for NAD/NR IV tolerability; indirect for mitochondrial peptide support

title: Niagen Plus product identity
supports_claim: Identifies Niagen as nicotinamide riboside chloride / NR, a NAD+ precursor, used in clinician-administered IV/IM offerings.
does_not_support: Does not independently prove clinical outcomes or peptide synergy.

title: NIH ODS Vitamin B12 Fact Sheet for Health Professionals
supports_claim: B12 deficiency risk is associated with malabsorption, GI surgery, prolonged metformin/PPI use, dietary deficiency; deficiency can cause fatigue and neurologic/hematologic symptoms.
does_not_support: Does not validate B12 infusion/injection as generic energy or peptide-enhancement therapy.
evidence_directness: direct for B12 risk trigger logic

title: NIH ODS Magnesium Fact Sheet for Health Professionals
supports_claim: Magnesium toxicity risk increases with impaired renal function/kidney failure.
does_not_support: Does not prove magnesium IV supports peptide therapy.

title: MSD/Merck Manual: Intravenous Vitamin Therapy / Myers' Cocktail
supports_claim: IV vitamin therapy is used in wellness settings but broad benefits are not confirmed; kidney disease, hypertension, heart conditions, pregnancy/breastfeeding and medication interactions are caution contexts.
does_not_support: Does not validate generic IV wellness drips or peptide support claims.
evidence_directness: direct for evidence-limit and safety-caution posture
